title: Escherichia phage Lambda linear map
description: A compact linear genome map for quick hover, click, pan, and zoom testing.
sourceNote: Base SVG is regenerated from the command during gallery asset preparation.
command: gbdraw linear --gbk NC_001416.gb --show_labels all --separate_strands --legend left -d cds_white.tsv -t lambda_specific_table.tsv --block_stroke_width 2 --axis_stroke_width 5 --definition_font_size 24 -f svg -o NC_001416
interactiveStep: Generated with the same Rich Interactive SVG enrichment used by the web app export.

title: Human mitochondrial genome, compact circular map
description: A small, label-rich circular genome for inspecting organellar labels and feature classes.
sourceNote: Base SVG is regenerated from the command during gallery asset preparation.
command: gbdraw circular --gbk NC_012920.gb -f svg --track_type middle --species "Homo sapiens" --block_stroke_width 2 --axis_stroke_width 5 --labels both --qualifier_priority qualifier_priority.tsv -o NC_012920_middle_qualifier_priority_inner_axis5_def28_italic --definition_font_size 28
interactiveStep: Generated with the same Rich Interactive SVG enrichment used by the web app export.

title: Hepatoplasmataceae five-genome comparison
description: A five-genome comparison spanning AP027078, AP027131, AP027133, AP027132, and NZ_CP006932.
sourceNote: Base SVG is regenerated from the command during gallery asset preparation.
command: gbdraw linear --gbk AP027078.gb AP027131.gb AP027133.gb AP027132.gb NZ_CP006932.gb -b AP027078_AP027131.tblastx.out AP027131_AP027133.tblastx.out AP027133_AP027132.tblastx.out AP027132_NZ_CP006932.tblastx.out --align_center --separate_strands --block_stroke_width 1 --block_stroke_color gray --palette default -f svg -o hepatoplasmataceae_default
interactiveStep: Generated with the same Rich Interactive SVG enrichment used by the web app export.

title: Majanivirus ten-genome comparison
description: A dense ten-genome comparison with many match blocks for stress-testing interactive inspection.
sourceNote: Base SVG is regenerated from the command during gallery asset preparation.
command: gbdraw linear --gbk MjeNMV.gb MelaMJNV.gb PemoMJNVA.gb PeseMJNV.gb PemoMJNVB.gb LvMJNV.gb TrcuMJNV.gb MellatMJNV.gb MeenMJNV.gb MejoMJNV.gb -b MjeNMV.MelaMJNV.tblastx.out MelaMJNV.PemoMJNVA.tblastx.out PemoMJNVA.PeseMJNV.tblastx.out PeseMJNV.PemoMJNVB.tblastx.out PemoMJNVB.LvMJNV.tblastx.out LvMJNV.TrcuMJNV.tblastx.out TrcuMJNV.MellatMJNV.tblastx.out MellatMJNV.MeenMJNV.tblastx.out MeenMJNV.MejoMJNV.tblastx.out -t majani_custom_color_table.tsv -d modified_default_colors.tsv --block_stroke_width 1 --block_stroke_color gray --align_center --separate_strands -f svg -o majani
interactiveStep: Generated with the same Rich Interactive SVG enrichment used by the web app export.

title: Sorangium cellulosum label whitelist
description: A large bacterial circular annotation with whitelist labels and custom feature colors.
sourceNote: Base SVG is regenerated from the command during gallery asset preparation.
command: gbdraw circular --gbk NC_010162.gb -f svg --palette edelweiss --labels --separate_strands -t NC_010162.feature-specific_table.tsv --label_whitelist NC_010162.whitelist.tsv --species "Sorangium cellulosum" --strain "So ce56"
interactiveStep: Generated with the same Rich Interactive SVG enrichment used by the web app export.

title: Nicotiana tabacum chloroplast genome
description: A chloroplast example with clear feature classes, custom colors, and compact circular layout.
sourceNote: Base SVG is regenerated from the command during gallery asset preparation.
command: gbdraw circular --gbk NC_001879.gbk --separate_strands -f svg -o NC_001879_color -k CDS,rRNA,tRNA,tmRNA,ncRNA,misc_RNA,rep_origin -t chloroplast_specific_table.tsv --block_stroke_width 1 --block_stroke_color black --axis_stroke_width 3 --line_stroke_width 2 --suppress_gc --suppress_skew -p default --track_type tuckin --labels both --qualifier_priority qualifier_priority.tsv --outer_label_x_radius_offset 0.90 --outer_label_y_radius_offset 0.90 --inner_label_x_radius_offset 0.975 --inner_label_y_radius_offset 0.975 --species "Nicotiana tabacum" --definition_font_size 28 --legend upper_left
interactiveStep: Generated with the same Rich Interactive SVG enrichment used by the web app export.
